name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Charlotte's ACE Cash Express on Freedom Dr offers quick payday and title loans with flexible terms.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express at 2706 Freedom Dr Suite B in Charlotte, NC is a standalone storefront in a convenient location for residents seeking quick financial solutions. The store operates Monday through Thursday from 10AM to 6PM, Friday 10AM to 7PM, and Saturday 10AM to 4PM, making it accessible for most working schedules in Charlotte. The location is easy to find and open when you need it.

This Charlotte location specializes in payday loans, title loans, and related short-term financial services designed to help you bridge unexpected gaps. Call +1 704-399-4433 to speak with staff about your specific needs—they can walk you through eligibility, documentation, and timing. Whether you need funds for an emergency or a short-term expense, the team here is ready to help.

If you're a Charlotte resident weighing your options, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and banking information when you visit. ACE Cash Express is built for speed—many loans are approved and funded within hours. It's a practical choice when traditional lenders won't work for your timeline.
address: 2706 Freedom Dr Suite B, Charlotte, NC 28208

pricing.guarantee_details: No standard money-back guarantee; payday and installment loans are fee-based transactions with fees varying by state.

pros: Founded in 1968 — 58+ years operating history makes ACE one of the most established payday lenders in the US
600+ retail locations across 36 states plus online access for same-day in-store cash
Full financial services suite in one location: payday loans, check cashing, bill pay, money orders, transfers, and tax prep
Payday loans available from as low as $50 in-store — useful for very small short-term needs
ACE Elite prepaid card and Flare Account give unbanked consumers mobile banking features without a bank account
Dual online and brick-and-mortar model allows in-person or digital access depending on customer preference
cons: Two CFPB enforcement actions — 2014 penalty of $10M total for illegal debt collection; 2022 lawsuit alleging concealed repayment options and improper fund withdrawals
Payday loan APRs are characteristically triple-digit depending on state — among the most expensive short-term borrowing available
Fees and APRs are not posted uniformly — consumers must check state-specific terms before borrowing
Not BBB accredited; specific BBB letter grade unconfirmed nationally
Services restricted to 36 states — not available to all US consumers
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need to cash a check without a bank account
Borrowers needing small emergency cash ($50–$715) same-day at a physical store
Consumers who want bundled financial services — payments, transfers, tax prep, and prepaid cards — in one location
People in ACE's 36 operating states who have exhausted lower-cost options and need immediate funds
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need same-day check cashing or small emergency loans and lack access to traditional banking or credit unions. The primary caveat is a documented history of CFPB enforcement actions and the characteristically very high APRs of payday products, which can make repeated borrowing financially damaging. Consumers with bank accounts or credit union access should compare lower-cost alternatives before using ACE's lending products.
services: Check cashing — payroll, tax refund, personal, and insurance checks
Prepaid debit cards — ACE Elite card and Flare Account
Mobile check deposit via ACE mobile app
meta_description: Charlotte, NC: ACE Cash Express at 2706 Freedom Dr - Quick payday loans and title loans.
